title: macrotyloma fimbriatum
intro: Macrotyloma fimbriatum, also known as Horse gram, is a type of legume plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Macrotyloma fimbriatum include its ability to reduce cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and help manage blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are often used to make tea, powder, or oil, and are also used as a food supplement in various forms.
